description: Palermo, tarihi dokusu ve eşsiz Akdeniz lezzetleriyle sizi bekliyor.
description_en: Palermo is waiting for you with its historical texture and unique Mediterranean flavors.

highlights.name: Palermo Cathedral
highlights.description: Arap-Norman mimarisinin en görkemli örneklerinden biri olan bu yapı, asırlar boyunca cami, kilise ve katedral olarak kullanılmıştır. İçindeki kraliyet mezarları ve panoramik çatı katı manzarasıyla kentin çok kültürlü geçmişinin en güçlü sembolüdür.
highlights.description_en: A grand tapestry of Arab-Norman architecture, this complex has been a mosque, a church, and a royal tomb over the centuries. Its stunning mosaics and panoramic rooftop offer a unique vantage point over Palermo's multicultural soul.

highlights.name: Palazzo dei Normanni
highlights.description: Avrupa'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel eski kentsel kentsel kentsel kraliyet kentsel kentsel kentsel ikametgahı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel kentsel saray, kentsel asalet kalesidir. Kentsel masalsı bir kaledir.
highlights.description_en: The oldest royal residence in Europe and the heart of the Sicilian Parliament. A majestic urban stronghold of Mediterranean political history and noble prestige.

highlights.name: Teatro Massimo di Palermo
highlights.description: İtalya'nın en büyük, Avrupa'nın ise üçüncü büyük opera binası olan Teatro Massimo, görkemli neoklasik tasarımı ve kusursuz akustiğiyle bilinir. 'Baba 3' filminin final sahnesine ev sahipliği yapan bu bina, Palermo'nun sanat ve ihtişam merkezidir.
highlights.description_en: As Italy's largest opera house, Teatro Massimo is a neoclassical jewel renowned for its perfect acoustics. Famous globally as the backdrop for the finale of 'The Godfather Part III,' it remains the cultural heart of Sicilian high art.

highlights.name: Quattro Canti
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel merkezinin kentsel kentsel kentsel sekizgen kentsel kentsel kentsel Barok kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbi kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel asalet kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: The octagonal Baroque heart of the historic center. A prestigious urban landmark marking the noble intersection of the four ancient quarters of the city.

highlights.name: Mercato Ballarò
highlights.description: Bin yılı aşkın süredir kentin en hareketli noktası olan Ballarò, Arap tarzı pazar geleneğini sürdürür. 'Panelle' ve 'Sfingi' gibi sokak lezzetleriyle dolu bu yer, Palermo'nun gerçek ruhunu ve gürültülü neşesini en iyi yansıtan noktadır.
highlights.description_en: A thousand-year-old tradition, Ballarò is Palermo’s oldest and most vibrant street market. Bursting with the shouts of vendors and the aroma of 'panelle' and 'arancini,' it offers an unfiltered sensory journey into the heart of Sicilian life.

highlights.name: Ancient Saint Francis Focaccia Shop
highlights.description: 1834'ten kentsel kentsel kentsel beri kentsel kentsel kentsel kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel efsanevi kentsel kentsel kentsel sokak kentsel kentsel kentsel lezzet kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesi kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel mühürlü kentsel lezzet durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: A world-class culinary landmark since 1834. The soul of Palermitan street food traditions and a prestigious urban stronghold for authentic island flavors.

highlights.name: Mondello Beach
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel kentsel bölgesi kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel Mondello, kentsel kentsel kentsel turkuaz kentsel kentsel suları kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kalesi.
highlights.description_en: The city's premier coastal destination, famous for its turquoise waters and Art Nouveau villas. A prestigious urban landmark for high-end Mediterranean seaside life.

highlights.name: Catacombe dei Cappuccini di Palermo
highlights.description: Dünyaca kentsel kentsel kentsel ünlü kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel büyüleyici kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A fascinating and globally unique historic site housing thousands of mummified remains. A vital urban landmark for exploring the peninsula's layered island history.

highlights.name: Orto Botanico di Palermo
highlights.description: İtalya'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel geniş kentsel kentsel kentsel botanik kentsel kentsel kentsel bahçesi kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel şehir kolesidir.
highlights.description_en: Italy's largest botanical garden, a prestigious 18th-century sanctuary. A vital urban lung and a green stronghold for Mediterranean biodiversity and scientific history.

highlights.name: Castello di Maredolce
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel antik kentsel kentsel kentsel Arap-Norman kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayı kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel su kentsel kentsel bahçelerinin kentsel mühürlü kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A 12th-century Arab-Norman palace surrounded by historic artificial lakes. A majestic urban landmark representing the peninsula's royal water gardens and engineering.

highlights.name: Cattedrale di Monreale
highlights.description: Muazzam kentsel kentsel kentsel altın kentsel kentsel kentsel mozaikleriyle kentsel kentsel kentsel tanınan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel UNESCO kentsel kentsel kentsel dünya kentsel kentsel kentsel mirası, kentsel asalet kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A UNESCO World Heritage masterpiece of Arab-Norman architecture. Known for its vast golden mosaics, it is a world-class urban landmark of medieval island power.

highlights.name: Zisa Palace
highlights.description: 12. yüzyıl kentsel kentsel kentsel Arap-Norman kentsel kentsel kentsel yazlık kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayı kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel mühendislik kentsel kentsel kentsel dehası kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A 12th-century Fatima-style summer palace. A world-class urban landmark of Mediterranean architecture, featuring advanced cooling engineering and noble gardens.

highlights.name: Church of Saint Mary 'dell'Ammiraglio'
highlights.description: Görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel Bizans kentsel kentsel kentsel mozaikleriyle kentsel kentsel kentsel ünlü kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel kilise, kentsel asalet kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: Also known as La Martorana, famous for its stunning 12th-century Byzantine mosaics. A vital urban landmark of the peninsula's diverse and layered historical culture.

highlights.name: Church of Saint John of the Hermits
highlights.name_en: Church of Saint John of the Hermits
highlights.description: İkonik kentsel kentsel kentsel kırmızı kentsel kentsel kentsel kubbelere kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel huzurlu kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel Akdeniz kentsel kentsel kentsel bahçesine kentsel kentsel sahip kentsel olan kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A striking example of Arab-Norman architecture with red domes. A serene urban sanctuary and a rooted stronghold of the island's multicultural history.

highlights.name: Palazzo Chiaramonte Steri
highlights.description: Palermo'nun kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel mahkeme kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel yönetim kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesi kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel yapı, kentin kentsel gücü kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A 14th-century fortress palace that once housed the Holy Inquisition. A powerful urban stronghold representing the peninsula's medieval administration and history.

highlights.name: Museo Palazzo Branciforte
highlights.description: Gae kentsel kentsel kentsel Aulenti kentsel kentsel kentsel tarafından kentsel kentsel kentsel modernize kentsel kentsel kentsel edilmiş kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kültür kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A 16th-century palace restored into a premier cultural and gastronomic center. A world-class urban landmark for high-end island art and culinary prestige.

highlights.name: Giardino della Zisa
highlights.description: Zisa kentsel kentsel kentsel Sarayı'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel önünde kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan, kentsel kentsel kentsel Mağribi kentsel kentsel tasarımlı kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel serinletici kentsel kentsel bahçeler kenti kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A beautiful Moorish-style garden and urban park fronting the Zisa Palace. A prestigious urban landmark featuring ancient water systems and Mediterranean island pulses.

highlights.name: Palazzo Butera
highlights.description: Kentsel kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel şeridinde kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel dehasal kentsel kentsel kentsel özel kentsel kentsel kentsel sanat kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel mühürlü kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A private noble palace restored into an elite art space. A prestigious urban landmark overlooking the coastal Foro Italico, celebrating island art and history.

highlights.name: Pinacoteca Villa Zito
highlights.description: Sicilya kentsel kentsel kentsel sanatının kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel eserlerini kentsel kentsel kentsel barındıran kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kültür kentsel mola kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: Housing a world-class collection of Sicilian and Italian paintings. A prestigious urban stronghold set in a noble 18th-century villa, marking the island's artistic heart.

highlights.name: Palazzo Pretorio
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel resmi kentsel kentsel kentsel belediye kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayı kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel yönetim kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesi kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kaledir. Kentsel masalsıdır.
highlights.description_en: Also known as Palazzo delle Aquile, this is the historic city hall. A majestic urban stronghold of civic governance and noble Palermo history since the 14th century.

highlights.name: Palazzo Alliata Villafranca
highlights.description: Bologna kentsel kentsel kentsel Meydanı'nda kentsel kentsel kentsel yükselen kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel kentsel konaklama kentsel rüyası kentsel ve kentsel kentsel asalet kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A majestic noble palace showing high-quality aristocratic heritage. A prestigious urban landmark for historical island power and Mediterranean social prestige.

highlights.name: Fountain Garraffello
highlights.description: Vucciria kentsel kentsel kentsel pazarının kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde kentsel kentsel kentsel efsanevi kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel atmosferik kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A historic 16th-century fountain in the Vucciria market. A powerful urban landmark of the city's layered and authentic social past and Mediterranean soul.

highlights.name: Cassaro Alto
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel eski kentsel kentsel kentsel caddesinin kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel saraylar kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel yürüyüş yoludur.
highlights.description_en: The upper part of the city's oldest street, a prestigious urban promenade. A majestic stronghold of noble palaces, cathedrals, and historical Ragusan-style grace.

highlights.name: Chiesa di Santa Maria in Valverde
highlights.name_en: Church of Santa Maria in Valverde
highlights.description: Loggia kentsel kentsel kentsel bölgesinde yükselen kentsel kentsel kentsel büyüleyici kentsel kentsel kentsel Barok kentsel kentsel kentsel mermer kentsel kentsel kentsel işçilik kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel ruhani kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A breathtaking Baroque church known for its intricate marble and sacred atmosphere. A world-class urban landmark of Sicilian religious art and historic serenity.

highlights.name: Museo Palazzo Mirto Casa Museo
highlights.description: Sicilya kentsel kentsel kentsel aristokrasisinin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel yaşam kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesi kentsel olan kentsel kentsel mühürlü merkezdir.
highlights.description_en: A perfectly preserved noble mansion showing the elite lifestyle of Sicilian aristocracy. A prestigious urban landmark for authentic island history and noble style.

highlights.name: Palazzo Cefalà
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel önemli kentsel kentsel kentsel Arap-Norman kentsel kentsel kentsel termal kentsel kentsel kentsel hamamlarını kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel gizemli kentsel kentsel mirasını kentsel koruyan kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A historic mansion housing one of the city's most important Arab-Norman baths. A vital urban landmark of the peninsula's diverse and layered historical engineering.

highlights.name: Chiesa di San Francesco Saverio
highlights.description: Albergheria kentsel kentsel kentsel bölgesinde kentsel kentsel kentsel köklü kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel Sicilya kentsel kentsel kentsel Barok kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel dini kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A masterpiece of Sicilian Baroque architecture in the Albergheria district. A prestigious urban landmark representing the island's artistic power and spiritual soul.

highlights.name: Villa Igiea, a Rocco Forte hotel
highlights.name_en: Villa Igiea, a Rocco Forte hotel
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel lüks kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel Art kentsel kentsel kentsel Nouveau kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel bir kentsel konaklama kentsel rüyasıdır. Kentsel masalsıdır.
highlights.description_en: The pinnacle of luxury at the water's edge, an Art Nouveau masterpiece. A world-class urban landmark representing the peninsula's most elite social history.

highlights.name: Hotel Porta Felice
highlights.description: Liman kentsel kentsel kentsel yakınında, kentsel kentsel kentsel restore kentsel kentsel kentsel edilmiş kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayda kentsel kentsel modern kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel rüyasıdır.
highlights.description_en: A modern and high-energy social hub in a restored noble palace near the harbor. A prestigious urban landmark for high-quality wellness and contemporary ease.

highlights.name: Grand Hotel Piazza Borsa
highlights.description: Tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel manastırdan kentsel kentsel dönüştürülen kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel lüks kentsel kentsel konaklama kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A prestigious luxury stay in a historic 16th-century monastery and cloister. A premier urban landmark for world-class hospitality and noble island serenity.

highlights.name: Grand Hotel et Des Palmes
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel efsanevi kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel sıradışı kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel lüks kentsel kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel mühürlü rüyasıdır.
highlights.description_en: A legendary and eccentric luxury landmark, a symbol of grand social history. A world-class urban stronghold for witnessing the island's high-quality past.

highlights.name: Palazzo Brunaccini
highlights.description: Ballarò kentsel kentsel kentsel pazarının kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde kentsel kentsel kentsel restore kentsel kentsel kentsel edilmiş kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel konak kenti.
highlights.description_en: A sophisticated boutique hotel in a restored noble house near the market. A prestigious urban landmark merging island history with high-end social comfort.

highlights.name: Addaura Hotel Residence Congressi
highlights.description: Monte kentsel kentsel kentsel Pellegrino kentsel kentsel kentsel eteğinde kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel konaklama kentsel rüyası kentesidir.
highlights.description_en: A premier seaside landing spot at the foot of Monte Pellegrino. A world-class urban landmark merging coastal beauty with high-end social interaction and pulses.

highlights.name: Hotel Ambasciatori
highlights.description: Via kentsel kentsel kentsel Roma üzerinde, kentsel kentsel kentsel panoramik kentsel kentsel manzarasıyla kentsel kentsel büyüleyen kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A chic and sophisticated landing spot featuring a spectacular rooftop terrace. A prestigious urban landmark for high-quality island views and noble social serenity.

highlights.name: La Locanda Del Drago
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde yükselen samimi ve köklü bir yerel gastronomi mühürlü kalesidir. Kentsel masalsıdır.
highlights.description_en: A charming and rooted culinary sanctuary focused on high-quality Mediterranean flavors. A unique urban landmark for authentic island dining and hospitality.

highlights.description_en: A creative and rooted restaurant focused on high-quality local products. A prestigious urban sanctuary for authentic island dining and modern Mediterranean pulses.

highlights.description_en: A high-quality destination for meat aficionados. A prestigious urban stronghold merging traditional grill methods with contemporary island style and social life.

highlights.name: Kalhesa Restaurant & Sushi Bar

highlights.description_en: A unique social space in the historic Kalsa walls. A world-class urban landmark merging Mediterranean flavors with modern pulses and high-end coastal style.

highlights.description_en: A contemporary and high-energy social point for authentic island quick bites. A high-quality destination for modern Mediterranean pulses and local style.

highlights.description_en: A chic and sophisticated social hub for the city's modern elite. A world-class urban landmark for high-quality interaction and contemporary island style.

highlights.description_en: A rooted and artisanal restaurant near the Royal Palace. A prestigious urban landmark for authentic local flavors and high-quality island hospitality.

highlights.description_en: A prestigious and rooted culinary stronghold for high-end Sicilian dishes. A world-class urban landmark of authentic island flavors and noble hospitality.

highlights.description_en: A world-class gastronomic sanctuary in a noble palace. A prestigious urban stronghold for high-end Sicilian wines and sophisticated international island style.

highlights.description_en: A grand 18th-century noble villa and famous film location. A world-class urban landmark of high-end Sicilian events and majestic aristocratic architecture.
